text.title: AI Triage, Classify, and Route Inbound Issues Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tracker-ai-triage-classify-route methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: classify-type
step.action: Classify as bug/story/epic/task/spike using a multi-shot prompt.

step.name: score-severity
step.action: Score blocker/critical/major/minor; if blocker, request on-call confirmation.
step.decision-gate: If on-call rejects blocker, demote to critical and continue.

step.name: label-and-route
step.action: Apply /area/*, /component/*, /lang/* labels; map to a CODEOWNERS team.

step.name: assign-and-comment
step.action: Pick least-loaded engineer on the team; emit audit comment listing every decision.
